commands.review_summary:
Renames the subagent completion handoff queue/API and persisted lease fields to a generic agent steering queue, updates embedded-runner call sites and tests, and includes small current-main check fixes around auth mocks, device-auth parsing, and reasoning metadata.

PR surface: Source +25, Tests -72. Total -47 across 14 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a refactor PR, not a bug report with a current-main failure to reproduce. I reviewed the diff, current source, tests, previous review comment, and feature history instead.

target.title: refactor: unify subagent handoffs into agent steering queue
target.body:
## Summary

- Replace the subagent-specific completion handoff queue with a generic agent steering queue module.
- Drain/ack/release queued steering items from embedded turns through generic registry APIs instead of subagent handoff APIs.
- Preserve persisted in-progress handoff leases by normalizing legacy lease fields into steering lease fields.
- Keep current `main` gates green after rebase by restoring auth-mock shape, test harness typing, device-auth token parsing, and a linted reasoning metadata check.
- Shrink the patch surface: 460 insertions, 507 deletions.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/subagent-delivery-state.test.ts src/agents/agent-steering-queue.test.ts src/agents/subagent-registry.test.ts src/agents/subagent-registry.persistence.test.ts src/agents/subagent-registry.lifecycle-retry-grace.e2e.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.media-understanding.config.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm lint --threads=8`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental false`
- `pnpm check:import-cycles`
- `git diff --cached --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Durable next-turn subagent completions now use the generic agent steering queue surface and survive old persisted in-progress lease fields during normalization.
Real environment tested: Local source checkout on Node/Vitest/tsgo, plus GitHub PR CI after push.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: The commands listed in Verification were run locally; autoreview was rerun after fixing its accepted finding and again for the incremental CI-fix patch.
Evidence after fix: Focused Vitest shards passed, media-understanding shard passed, lint passed, test-types passed, tsgo passed, import-cycle check reported 0 runtime value cycles, diff check passed, autoreview returned no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: Pending queued completions are leased, injected, acked/released through the generic steering queue and old handoff lease fields are migrated into steering lease fields.
What was not tested: Full `pnpm check` was left to PR CI.

Refs #88407.
target.author: steipete
